'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=CcMZ.S09fIE2zzzfdzlDDsWk960kHuPrP_3Fc9MgWfM-1774395013-1.0.1.1-zBAPknkFvExlh6.waTD9z9bIeApF6GQxo4H7S0PZW9s"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
